system_configurations.name: RCCL-Tests-NET-IB-Transport
system_configurations.description: Comprehensive InfiniBand transport test config. Runs all NetIbMPITest tests including plugin API, physical device, and virtual device (vNIC) tests.

mpi_args.mellanox: --mca oob_tcp_if_include eth1 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eth1 --mca btl ^vader,openib --bind-to none
mpi_args.ainic: --mca oob_tcp_if_include eno0 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eno0 --mca btl ^vader,openib --bind-to none
mpi_args.thor2: --oversubscribe --mca plm_rsh_agent srun --mca oob_tcp_if_include eno8303 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eno8303 --mca btl ^openib --bind-to none

tests.name: NetIB_Init_Plugin
tests.description: Initialize InfiniBand network plugin and verify basic setup

tests.name: NetIB_Init_GetDeviceCount
tests.description: Query and validate InfiniBand device count

tests.name: NetIB_Props_GetProperties
tests.description: Query InfiniBand device properties and capabilities

tests.name: NetIB_Props_InvalidDevice
tests.description: Error handling when querying properties of invalid InfiniBand device

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_ListenAndConnect
tests.description: Basic listen/connect/accept handshake over IB

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_InvalidHandle
tests.description: Connect with invalid handle error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_CloseWithoutWaiting
tests.description: Close connection without waiting for transfer completion

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_MultipleSequential
tests.description: Multiple sequential listen/connect/close cycles

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_ListenCloseListen
tests.description: Close listener mid-handshake and re-listen on same port

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_MultipleSimultaneousListens
tests.description: Multiple concurrent listeners on different handles

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_RapidConnectDisconnect
tests.description: Rapid repeated connect/disconnect cycles for resource leak detection

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterHost
tests.description: Register host memory buffers for IB RDMA

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterGpu
tests.description: Register GPU device memory buffers for IB RDMA

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterNull
tests.description: Register NULL pointer error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_DeregisterNull
tests.description: Deregister NULL handle error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_SimpleSendRecv
tests.description: Basic IB send/receive data transfer

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSizes
tests.description: IB data transfer with multiple buffer sizes

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_ZeroSize
tests.description: IB zero-byte send/receive

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_LargeTransfer
tests.description: IB large buffer data transfer

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSequential
tests.description: Multiple sequential send/recv on the same connection

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_DifferentMemoryTypes
tests.description: Send/recv with mixed host and GPU memory buffers

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSizesFusion
tests.description: Send/recv multiple buffer sizes through fused vNIC

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleOutstanding
tests.description: Multiple outstanding send/recv requests in flight simultaneously

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_Multidirectional
tests.description: Concurrent bidirectional transfers across multiple connections

tests.name: NetIB_Flush_AfterRecv
tests.description: GPU flush (iflush) after receive with GDR

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_MakeVirtualDevice
tests.description: Create virtual device from 2 physical IB NICs via makeVDevice(ndevs=2)

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_InvalidProps
tests.description: Reject makeVDevice with ndevs=0 (ncclInvalidUsage)

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_MergeMultipleDevices
tests.description: Merge more than two physical IB NICs into a single virtual device

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_ConnectAndTransfer
tests.description: End-to-end data transfer through fused vNIC (ndevs=2)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_AsymmetricMerge
tests.description: Connection with mismatched ndevs (vNIC ndevs=2 vs physical ndevs=1)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_CloseWithoutTransfer
tests.description: Clean teardown of never-used multi-PD/QP vNIC connection

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_UnalignedSizeTransfer
tests.description: Data integrity at 128-byte QP striping alignment boundaries

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_LargeTransfer
tests.description: 64MB payload striped across doubled QPs on vNIC

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_MixedSizes
tests.description: Rapid tiny/large size transitions on multi-QP vNIC path

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_Bidirectional
tests.description: Full-duplex concurrent send+recv through same fused device

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_FlushRepeated
tests.description: 50x GPU flush QP stability under repeated invocation (requires GDR)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_SequentialTransfers
tests.description: 100x send/recv reuse on same doubled QP pool

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_Reconnect
tests.description: 10x connect/transfer/close cycles for resource leak detection

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_RegDeregCycling
tests.description: 50x regMr/deregMr cycles on multi-PD MR cache

test_suites.name: NET IB - Initialization
test_suites.description: InfiniBand plugin initialization and device enumeration

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Edge
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC edge case and boundary condition tests

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Stress
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC stress, reconnect, and repeated-operation tests
